title: crassula mollis
intro: Crassula mollis, also known as the woolly jade plant, is a succulent species in the Crassulaceae family characterized by its soft, woolly leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Crassula mollis are said to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing sore throats. Crassula mollis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
